raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Improving patient care and outcomes at California State Hospitals can be shaped by a report detailing funds budgeted and spent for civil service psychiatrists and contract psychiatrists.",
    "Folic acid is essential to preventing birth defects, and fortifying corn masa can help support healthy pregnancies by improving dietary intake in women before pregnancy.",
    "California's Dream for All loan program for first-time homebuyers clarifies that undocumented immigrants can apply for home ownership assistance under certain conditions.",
    "Allowing alternate teleconferencing provisions for legislative student organizations can enhance student participation in public meetings without compromising safety or privacy.",
    "Establishing a Labor Trafficking Unit within the State’s Department of Justice will help prioritize and better support survivors of labor trafficking through efficient enforcement.",
    "Access to culturally and linguistically appropriate health care can lead to better communication, treatment, and outcomes for patients.",
    "A critical shortage of physicians in California, particularly in the Central Valley, affects the diversity of the medical workforce.",
    "Providing equitable access to safety net programs can reduce administrative barriers for tribal communities accessing CalWORKS and TANF at Indian Health Clinics.",
    "Designating a California Latino & Latina Physician Day can help raise awareness of the shortage of culturally representative healthcare providers.",
    "The establishment of a National Infrastructure Bank is estimated to generate 25 million new jobs nationwide."
  ]
}
```
